working_on: Issue close-out campaign C6 — Issue #33 timestamp standardization: ADR 0058 + engine/tools/timestamps.py helper + validate.py timestamp_helper_bypass soft-warn + 13 emit/parse-site migrations across engine/tools
outcome_summary: S-0095 closes Issue #33 timestamp standardization (campaign C6) via ADR 0058 + engine/tools/timestamps.py (4 functions: emit/emit_micros/parse/today) + new validate.py AST-walk soft-warn timestamp_helper_bypass. 13 emit/parse-site migrations across 9 engine/tools files including the smoking-gun fix at health_check.py:960-961 (.replace gymnastics replaced with parse()). 4-file allowlist with rationale (apply_migration.py legacy supabase, probe_push_gate.py branch-name colon-safe, audit_mempalace_attribution.py palace naive-local-time, scan_mempalace_citations.py palace naive-local-date). Discovered during execution: original plan's single allowlist expanded as legitimate non-canonical contracts surfaced. 33 new pytests + 1 extension; 980 pytests pass; mypy --strict + ruff clean; empirical grep clean. Validator at close: 0 hard-fails; 374 soft-warns at expected baseline (timestamp_helper_bypass: 0). Soft-warns mempalace_boot_query_skipped + mempalace_diary_read_skipped expected (boot search ran via CLI not MCP; no diary read this interactive session). Decision drawer drawer_paideia_decisions_9a75ed11c5f1a40981c6fffc captured per ADR 0058 two-layer recording. Health-check audit deferral continues per campaign plan.
declared_scope: Close Issue #33 (timestamp standardization) by landing ADR 0058 (canonical timestamp format and shared helper), engine/tools/timestamps.py (4-function helper: emit/emit_micros/parse/today), and engine/operations/timestamp-discipline.md (Layer 1 contract). Add validate.py soft-warn timestamp_helper_bypass (AST-walk over engine/tools/**/*.py with apply_migration.py allowlisted) and migrate 13 emit/parse sites across engine/tools to route through the helper. Smoking-gun fix at engine/tools/health_check.py:960-961 replaces the .replace('Z', '+00:00') gymnastics with the helper's tolerant parse(). Phase 5 closeout / issue close-out campaign C6 per the campaign plan; C7 (Issue #34) follows.
